title: Asana Task
description: The task is the basic object around which many operations in Asana are centered. Tasks represent units of work that can be assigned, prioritized, and tracked.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

name.description: Name of the task. Generally a short sentence fragment.

approval_status.description: Conditional. Reflects the approval status of this task.

completed.description: True if the task is currently marked complete.

completed_at.description: The time at which this task was completed, or null if incomplete.

completed_by.description: The user who completed this task.

created_at.description: The time at which this resource was created.

modified_at.description: The time at which this task was last modified.

due_at.description: The UTC date and time on which this task is due.

due_on.description: The localized date on which this task is due (YYYY-MM-DD).

start_at.description: Date and time on which work begins for the task.

start_on.description: The day on which work begins for the task (YYYY-MM-DD).

notes.description: Free-form textual information associated with the task.

html_notes.description: The notes of the text with formatting as HTML.

assignee.description: The user to whom this task is assigned.

parent.description: The parent of this task, or null if not a subtask.

projects.description: Array of projects this task is associated with.

tags.description: Array of tags associated with this task.

followers.description: Array of users following this task.

workspace.description: The workspace this task is associated with.

custom_fields.description: Array of custom field values applied to the task.

liked.description: True if the task is liked by the authorized user.

num_likes.description: The number of users who have liked this task.

num_subtasks.description: The number of subtasks on this task.

permalink_url.description: A URL that points directly to the object within Asana.

actual_time_minutes.description: Sum of all Time Tracking entries in the Actual Time field.

external.description: OAuth Required. App-specific metadata on tasks.

memberships.description: Array of projects and sections this task belongs to.
